1856980.name: VirtualSociety
1856980.description:
VirtualSociety is a multiplayer sandbox where your imagination sets the rules!
It’s a living, free, and welcoming space designed so you can create, build, explore, and have fun however you feel like it!

Want to build the house of your dreams? Create a city with your friends? Or just chill around a virtual campfire and talk peacefully? Anything is possible.

In VirtualSociety, you choose the vibe: chill, fun, creative, social… The world adapts to your mood — not the other way around! It’s up to you to bring your universe to life!

🛠️ UNLIMITED CREATION & MULTIPLAYER

A massive sandbox

In VirtualSociety, everything is editable!
Build entire worlds — from houses to outdoor environments, lighting, and atmospheres. You can build your universe block by block… or join a ready-made world if you prefer!

Fun and powerful building tools

Whether you feel like building only outdoor spaces, houses, or parks — anything is possible!
The tools are designed to be intuitive, fun, and accessible, whether you’re a born creator or just curious.

Solo, with friends, or with the whole world

Join public servers to meet new people, or create your own private server to stay solo or play with friends!
VirtualSociety adapts to your current energy.

An avatar that looks like you (or not!)

Body shape, style, accessories, clothing… create a truly unique avatar!
You can be yourself, or try something totally new — with no pressure and no judgment.

Gameplay that evolves with you

Whether you love cozy games, roleplay, social experiences, puzzles, or even slightly more mysterious worlds — you can shape the world that fits you.
In VirtualSociety, you create the kind of experience you want to live. Every world can become a different adventure!

Simple, instant interactions

Even without a goal, there’s always something to do: cook, draw, skate, play with water guns, craft…
The world is packed with interactive objects to have fun!

💻 A CREATOR & MODDER’S PARADISE

A creative engine open to everyone

Got an idea? VirtualSociety gives you the tools to make it real without coding, thanks to our built-in scripting system!

Story & NPC editor

Create quests, write dialogues, design your characters: a visual, smooth, and super intuitive system to tell your own stories.

Plugins & Mods

Import your assets (3D models, music, textures…), add your own systems, imagine mini-games…
You can completely transform your world!

A creative and welcoming community

Share your creations, use other players’ creations, collaborate, remix, transform…
VirtualSociety is an infinite territory, powered by players, for players!
1856980.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 意大利语, 简体中文
